question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?character
WHERE {
  ?character p:P451 ?statement1 .
  ?statement1 ps:P451 wd:Q4205826 .
  ?character p:P451 ?statement2 .
  ?statement2 ps:P451 wd:Q4463198 .
  FILTER (?statement1 != ?statement2)
}

question.string: among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?work ?workLabel
WHERE
{
  ?author wdt:P50 ?work.
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author.
  ?author wdt:P50 ?hunterXHunter.
  FILTER(?work != ?hunterXHunter)
  ?work wdt:P2679|wdt:P50 ?forewordAuthor.
  ?work rdfs:label ?workLabel.
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?workLabel), "en")).
  FILTER CONTAINS(LCASE(?workLabel), "middle school student").
  BIND("Hunter x Hunter" AS ? hunterXHunter).
}

question.string: On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q7043068 wdt:P569 ?brookeBirth .
  wd:Q7043068 wdt:P495 ?brookeState .
  wd:Q97658745 wdt:P569 ?colinBirth .
  wd:Q97658745 wdt:P495 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState)
}
